name: ftml-intellisense
description: Autocomplete and validation for FTML (Front Template Markup Language) attributes

ftml.enableValidation.description: Enable FTML attribute validation (yellow warnings for unknown attributes)

scripts.reinstall: npm run uninstall && npm run package && npm run install
scripts.setup: npm i && npm run package && npm run install
scripts.push: git add -A && git commit --allow-empty-message -m '' && git push --force
